name: Integrating Recommendations in Norce
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integrating recommendations in Norce enables personalized product suggestions within your Norce-powered ecommerce platform. When recommendations work natively with Norce, you help improve cross-sell opportunities and average order value, which tends to enhance revenue performance through strategically placed product suggestions that leverage Norce's platform capabilities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Norce recommendation integration enables sophisticated merchandising within your platform architecture. This helps you provide personalized shopping experiences that drive better conversion and revenue outcomes, supporting improved business performance through AI-powered product suggestions optimized for Norce's ecommerce framework."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "To integrate Recommendations follow these steps:"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/norse-integrating-recommendations#to-integrate-findify-recommendations-follow-these-steps", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "to-integrate-recommendations-follow-these-steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "General Information"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Integrating Recommendations on Product or Cart Pages"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. General Information"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/norse-integrating-recommendations#1-general-information", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "1-general-information"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to integrate Recommendation widgets, please follow these "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/react-bundle#recommendation", "children": [{"text": "guidelines"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "Before you integrate a specific recommendation widget, please make sure to setup the corresponding widget in our "}, {"text": "Merchant Dashboard", "code": true}, {"text": " -> "}, {"text": "Recommendations section", "code": true}, {"text": ": "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/recommendations#how-do-i-use-findify-recommendations", "children": [{"text": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/recommendations#how-do-i-use-findify-recommendations"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Integrating Recommendations on Product or Cart Pages"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/docs/norse-integrating-recommendations#2-integrating-recommendations-on-product-or-cart-pages", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "data-id": "2-integrating-recommendations-on-product-or-cart-pages"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For Product or Cart Page type of Recommendations, it is required to provide the product ids of the currently viewed/added to the cart items."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Those ids will then need to be passed to our "}, {"text": "useFindify", "code": true}, {"text": " hook like this:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "const [container, isReady, hasError] = useFindify({ type: 'recommendation', options: { rules: [{ 'action': 'exclude', 'type': 'text', 'name': 'id', 'values': [{ value: [\"item_id_1\", \"item_id_2\", ...] //provide the list of ids to the value array }]}], item_ids: [\"item_id_1\", \"item_id_2\", ...] //provide the list of ids to the value array }, config: { slot: 'RECOMMENDATION_SLOT', } });"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
